label: Screen context • TextEdit document selection + viewport (synthetic)
notes: Synthetic inline scene for TextEdit (uncovered app). Pins the focused document body as a text area whose selection and cursor viewport surface verbatim under a TextEdit gist — a plain-document generalization complementing the Notes scene.
